title: WhatsApp AI Agent Setup Guide
description: A step-by-step guide helping users build a WhatsApp-connected AI agent that mimics their communication style using conversation history and automated responses.
gumroad_description:
You're losing hours every week typing the same WhatsApp replies — and still sounding inconsistent.

This guide walks you through building an AI agent that connects directly to WhatsApp, learns from your actual conversation history, and responds the way you would. No guesswork, no generic bot voice.

WHO THIS IS FOR
— Freelancers drowning in client follow-ups and intake questions
— Founders who need to stay responsive without being glued to their phone
— Consultants who want replies that sound like them, not like ChatGPT

WHAT'S INSIDE
— Step-by-step setup that gets your agent live without prior automation experience
— Conversation history integration so the AI mirrors your real tone and patterns
— Automated response logic you can customize for different contact types
— A quick-reference summary you can return to without re-reading everything
— Markdown format that stays clean whether you read it in Notion, Obsidian, or a browser

This is a focused, practical guide — no padding, no theory, just the build.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
